description_long: This is a modern street motorcycle with a streamlined blue body and black accents, designed for urban commuting. It features a prominent headlamp at the front, flanked by two rearview mirrors and a small windscreen. The seat is elongated and slightly raised at the rear, providing space for both the rider and a passenger. The wheels are large with visible disc brakes, and the exhaust pipe runs along the right side of the bike. The rear section includes a taillight, indicators, and a license plate holder. The overall build suggests a lightweight yet sturdy frame, suitable for maneuvering through city traffic.
description: A blue and black modern street motorcycle with a streamlined body, large wheels, and an elongated seat for two riders.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headlamp, windscreen, and both rearview mirrors.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue body panels, black seat, and front and rear wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the taillight, license plate holder, and the back of the seat.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the exhaust pipe, blue body, and the full length of the seat.
